Acetylene (

≈ 1.54 ⁢
µm
ii(lambda) ~~ 1.54 "unitsml(um)")
Part 2.25
Appendix 2
Le système international d’unités
Valeurs recommandées des fréquences étalons destinées à la mise en pratique de la définition du mètre et aux représentations secondaires de la seconde

Acetylene (

≈ 1.54 ⁢
µm

F-92312 Sèvres Cedex
FRANCE

p.strong:
Absorbing molecule 13C2H2, P(16) (
ν 1
+
ν 3
nu_1+nu_3) transition

li.p:
with a relative standard uncertainty of
2.6 ×
10
− 11
2.6 xx 10^(-11) apply to the radiation of a laser stabilized using the third harmonic detection technique to an external 13C2H2 cell within an enhancement cavity and subject to the following conditions:

frequency modulation width, peak-to-peak
( 1 ± 0.5 )
⁢
MHz
(1 +- 0.5) "unitsml(MHz)"
For the specification of operating conditions, such as temperature, modulation width and laser power, the symbols ± refer to a tolerance, not an uncertainty. ;

one-way intracavity beam power density of
( 25 ± 20 )
⁢
W
⁢
cm
− 2
(25 +- 20) "unitsml(W*cm^(-2))"

clause.title: Source data
clause.p:
In order to combine these measurements which were carried out with a variety of acetylene cell pressures, the values were converted to a common
3 ⁢
Pa
3 "unitsml(Pa)" cell pressure by use of the pressure shift coefficients measured for each particular system, leading to the following values:

The recommended value by the CCL is the unweighted mean of these last four values, rounded to the nearest
kHz
"unitsml(kHz)". Given the good agreement between the different laboratories, the CCL decided to reduce the uncertainty from the
10 ⁢
kHz
10 "unitsml(kHz)" 2003 value to 5kHz (
2.6 ×
10
− 11
2.6 xx 10^(-11)), which corresponds approximately to the quadrature sum of the quoted uncertainties, then rounded up.

clause.title: Frequency intervals of the other transitions of the band related to the recommended value
clause.p: replaces that published in BIPM Com. Cons. Long., 2001, 10, 177, and in Metrologia, 2003, 40, 124.

li.p: The notation for the transitions is that used in the source references. The values adopted for the frequency intervals were determined from the unweighted mean of the values given by three laboratories in references , , , , where available.
The uncertainties were determined from the square root of the quadrature sum of individual line uncertainties divided by the number of laboratories contributing and then rounded.

u c
u_c represents the estimated combined standard uncertainty (
1
σ
1 ii(sigma)).

tr.th:
λ
≈ 1.54 ⁢
µm
ii(lambda) ~~ 1.54 "unitsml(um)" 13C2H2
(
ν
1
+
ν
3
)
(ii(nu)_1 + ii(nu)_3) band

clause.title: Absolute frequencies of transitions in other bands
clause.p:
Data were reported by only one laboratory. Consequently, the corresponding uncertainties were increased by a factor of three. In the following tables, the quoted uncertainty associated with each transition is the higher value of either the calculated uncertainty or the adopted uncertainty for the recommended transition P16 (
5 ⁢
kHz
5 "unitsml(kHz)").

tr.th:
λ
≈ 1.54 ⁢
µm

5
)

≈ 1.54 ⁢
µm

clause.p: The values in this table have been updated after a recommendation of the CIPM and have replaced the data from .

≈ 1.54 ⁢

ii(lambda) ~~ 1.54 "unitsml(um)" 12C2HD
( 2

1
)

clause.p: The values in this table have been added after a recommendation of the CCL and the CIPM .

bibitem.formattedref:
Balling P., Fischer M., Kubina Ph., Holzwarth R., Absolute Frequency Measurement of Wavelength Standard at
1542 ⁢
nm
1542 "unitsml(nm)": Acetylene-Stabilized DFB Laser, Opt. Express, 13 (23), pp. 9196-9201, 2005.

Jiang J., Onae A., Matsumoto H., Hong F.-L., Frequency Measurement of Acetylene-Stabilized Lasers using a Femtosecond Optical Comb Without Carrier-Envelope Offset Frequency Control, Opt. Express, 13 (6), pp. 1958-65, 2005.

Edwards C. S., Margolis H. S., Barwood G. P., Lea S. N., Gill P., Rowley W. R. C., High-Accuracy Frequency Atlas of 13C2H2 in the
1.5 ⁢
µm
1.5 "unitsml(um)" Region, Appl. Phys. B, 80, pp. 977-83, 2005.

Czajkowski A., Bernard J. E., Madej A. A., Windeler R. S., Absolute Frequency Measurement of Acetylene Transitions in the Region of
1540 ⁢
nm
1540 "unitsml(nm)", Appl. Phys. B, 79, pp. 45-50, 2004.

Madej A. A., Bernard J. E., Alcock A. J., Czajkowski A., Chepurov S., Accurate Absolute Frequencies of the
ν 1
+
ν 3
nu_1 + nu_3 Band of 13C2H2 Determined Using an Infrared Mode-Locked Cr:YAG Laser Frequency Comb, J. Opt. Soc. Am. B, 23 (4), pp. 741-49, 2006.

Edwards C. S., Barwood G. P., Margolis H. S., Gill P., Rowley W. R. C., High-precision frequency measurements of the
ν 1
+
ν 3
nu_1 + nu_3 combination band of 12C2H2 in the
1.5 ⁢
µm
1.5 "unitsml(um)" region, J. Mol. Spectr., 234, pp. 143-8, 2005.
Report of the 13th meeting (13 – 14 September 2007) of the Consultative Committee for Length (CCL) to the International Committee for Weights and Measures p. 36 (see e.g. ).

Procès-Verbaux des Séances du Comité International des Poids et Mesures, 96th meeting (2007) 2008, Recommendation 1 (CI-2007): Revision of the Mise en pratique list of recommended radiations. p. 185 (see e.g. ).
